citations.author_arabic: السيد المرتضى أبو القاسم علي بن الحسين الموسوي
citations.author_transliterated: al-Sayyid al-Murtada Abu l-Qasim Ali b. al-Husayn al-Musawi
citations.context_detail: Citing al-Murtada's al-Fusul to refute the Mu'tazila's defense of al-Nizam and al-Jahiz regarding the story of al-Mukhdaj and Ali's gaze to the sky.

citations.author_arabic: الشيخ المفيد محمد بن محمد بن النعمان
citations.author_transliterated: al-Shaykh al-Mufid Muhammad b. Muhammad b. al-Nu'man
citations.context_detail: Footnote reference to al-Qususul in the context of al-Mufid's rebuttal to al-Nizam and al-Jahiz.

citations.author_arabic: شمس الدين محمد بن أحمد الذهبي
citations.author_transliterated: Shams al-Din Muhammad b. Ahmad al-Dhahabi
citations.context_detail: al-Dhahabi praises al-Mufid as a leading Shi'i scholar, imam of the Rafida, prolific author, and ascetic.
Quoted by al-Dhahabi: al-Mufid is the shaykh of the Shi'i sect's shaykhs, leader in speech, fiqh, and debate.

citations.author_arabic: أبو محمد عبد الله بن أسعد بن علي اليافعي
citations.author_transliterated: Abu Muhammad 'Abd Allah b. As'ad b. 'Ali al-Ya'fi'i
citations.context_detail: al-Ya'fi'i repeats al-Dhahabi's praise of al-Mufid as Shi'i scholar and imam of Rafida.
citations.vol_page_cited: ج # ص ٥٠ ط دائرة المعارف النظامية بحيدر آباد الدكن

citations.author_arabic: شهاب الدين أحمد بن علي بن محمد بن حجر العسقلاني
citations.author_transliterated: Shihab al-Din Ahmad b. 'Ali b. Muhammad b. Hajar al-'Asqalani
citations.context_detail: Ibn Hajar critiques al-Mufid as Rafidi scholar who authored many books attacking the Salaf; nested quote from al-Khatib.

citations.author_arabic: أبو بكر أحمد بن علي الخطيب البغدادي
citations.author_transliterated: Abu Bakr Ahmad b. 'Ali al-Khatib al-Baghdadi
citations.context_detail: Nested in Lisan al-Mizan: al-Khatib says al-Mufid authored many books in misguidance and attacking Companions.

citations.author_arabic: صلاح الدين خليل بن أيبك الصفدي
citations.author_transliterated: Salah al-Din Khalil b. Aybak al-Safadi
citations.context_detail: al-Safadi calls al-Mufid head of Rafida, authored books on misguidance; quotes al-Rida's poetry (corrected by author).
Cited to correct al-Safadi's misattribution of poetry to al-Rida instead of al-Murtada.
Cited alongside al-Mukhtasar for correction of al-Safadi.
Footnote referencing discussion on al-Jahiz's attacks.

citations.author_arabic: عبد الحميد بن هبة الله بن محمد بن أبي الحديد المعتزلي
citations.author_transliterated: 'Abd al-Hamid b. Hibat Allah b. Muhammad b. Abi l-Hadid al-Mu'tazili
citations.context_detail: Ibn Abi l-Hadid refutes claims against Ali's asceticism using property from Siffin as sadaqa.
citations.vol_page_cited: ج ٦ ص ٤٥ دار الإحياء الكتب العربية

citations.author_arabic: شريف الرضي محمد بن الحسين الموسوي
citations.author_transliterated: al-Sharif al-Radi Muhammad b. al-Husayn al-Musawi
citations.context_detail: Referenced in Ibn Abi l-Hadid's sharh for Ali's will on property management.

citations.author_arabic: شريف الرضي محمد بن الحسين الموسوي
citations.author_transliterated: al-Sharif al-Radi Muhammad b. al-Husayn al-Musawi
citations.context_detail: Ali's khutba 149 refuting claims of sorcery at young age.

citations.author_arabic: عبد الحميد بن هبة الله بن محمد بن أبي الحديد المعتزلي
citations.author_transliterated: 'Abd al-Hamid b. Hibat Allah b. Muhammad b. Abi l-Hadid al-Mu'tazili
citations.context_detail: Ibn Abi l-Hadid quotes al-Jahiz on Ali's young age at Islam.

citations.author_arabic: الشيخ أبو جعفر محمد بن عبد الله الإسكافي المعتزلي
citations.author_transliterated: al-Shaykh Abu Ja'far Muhammad b. 'Abd Allah al-Iskafi al-Mu'tazili
citations.context_detail: al-Iskafi refutes al-Jahiz's claims on Ali's age and maturity at Islam.

citations.author_arabic: السيد المرتضى أبو القاسم علي بن الحسين الموسوي
citations.author_transliterated: al-Sayyid al-Murtada Abu l-Qasim Ali b. al-Husayn al-Musawi
citations.context_detail: al-Murtada in al-Fusul quotes al-Mufid refuting Nasibi claims on Ali's faith as taqlid.

citations.author_arabic: عبد الحميد بن هبة الله بن محمد بن أبي الحديد المعتزلي
citations.author_transliterated: 'Abd al-Hamid b. Hibat Allah b. Muhammad b. Abi l-Hadid al-Mu'tazili

citations.author_arabic: الشيخ المفيد محمد بن محمد بن النعمان
citations.author_transliterated: al-Shaykh al-Mufid Muhammad b. Muhammad b. al-Nu'man
citations.context_detail: Extended section from p.64 to p.67 on refuting al-Jahiz.
